description: **VCC: NOT INTERIOR WORK ONLY. VCC REVIEW AND APPROVAL ARE REQUIRED. THE PROJECT SCOPE IS RESTRICTED TO INTERIOR RENOVATIONS OF SELECT SPACES THROUGHOUT THE SUB-BASEMENT, BASEMENT, LEVEL 01, LEVEL 02 & LEVEL 03 AT THE ROYAL SONESTA LOCATED AT 300 BOURBON ST. IN NEW ORLEANS, LA., AND DOES NOT AFFECT THE EXISTING OCCUPANCY, EXISTING OCCUPANCY COUNTS OR EXISTING EGRESS ROUTES. SPACES INCLUDED IN THE RENOVATION ARE OUTLINED BELOW: SUB-BASEMENT: ROYAL/CONTI, BACCHUS, BOURBON, CORRIDOR, & STAIR 12, BASEMENT STAIR 12, FITNESS ROOM, WOMENS & MENS RR, MOTOR LOBBY LEVEL 1: MAIN BALLROOM, PREFUNCTION, EVANGELINE (A, B, C), VESTIBULE, REGAL ROOM, ARCADE, ESPLANADE, IBERVILLE, SOLEIL & SOULE, ENTRANCE LOBBY, HOTEL LOBBY, LE BOOZE, JAZZ PLAYHOUSE, COURTYARD, FLEUR DE LIS SALON, FLEUR DE LIS (A, B, C), DESIRE OYSTER BAR, WOMENS & MENS RR. LEVEL 2: BOARD ROOM, TECHE, BELLE GROVE, OAK ALLEY, MADEWOOD, GRIS GRIS, CHOCTAW, ASSEMBLY AREA, & TERRACE LEVEL 3: POOL BAR REFERENCE SHEET PS-G004.00 FOR A DIAGRAM OF AREA OF RENOVATION SCOPE THAT IS A LEVEL 1 ALTERATION & LEVEL 2 ALTERATION. THE HOTEL IS TO REMAIN FULLY OPERATIONAL WITH ALL LIFE SAFETY SYSTEMS FULLY OPERATIONAL DURING CONSTRUCTION. ALL RESTROOM FIXTURE COUNTS ARE EXISTING TO REMAIN AND WILL NOT BE ALTERED AS PART OF THE INTERIOR RENOVATION.
